title: Purpose
summary: Establishes that certain uses may be constructed/continued/expanded if they meet mitigating conditions specific to their design and/or operation for compatibility.

title: Accessory Dwellings
summary: Accessory dwellings in separate building: owner must occupy principal dwelling, max 1/2 area of principal, must meet principal structure setbacks, rear or side yard only, NC Building Standards.

title: Accessory Structures (Residential)
summary: Side/rear yard only (R-P allows front if 150ft from ROW). Not closer than 3ft from other buildings. Fences, mailboxes, birdhouses exempt from permit. Height cannot exceed principal structure. On lots 1 acre or less, total accessory area max 1/2 of principal. No vehicles/trailers as accessory structures.

title: Adult Establishments
summary: Must be 1,000ft from schools, churches, daycares, parks, residential uses/districts, and other adult establishments. Max one per structure/lot. No interior visibility from outside. Strict sign, color, lighting, and sound restrictions.

title: Agricultural Uses
summary: ETJ farm uses exempt per NCGS 160D-903. Existing ag uses in R-S may continue/expand. Beekeeping: max 5 hives, behind residence, 50ft from property line. Accessory uses on 1+ acre properties permitted with zoning permit.

title: Animal Slaughtering and Processing
summary: Min 10 acres, 100ft perimeter setbacks, 1,000ft from residential districts. No open lagoons, no overnight livestock. Waste/refuse plan required. All processing indoors.

title: Automotive, Boat, RV, Heavy Equipment, Manufactured Home Sales/Service and Commercial Parking Lots
summary: Parking/display areas max 3 acres unless divided. Must be paved. Street Planting Yard required. No outdoor sound systems audible beyond property. Commercial parking lots in C-B require Conditional Rezoning.

title: Bed and Breakfast Homes and Inns
summary: Homes: max 4 guest bedrooms (up to original count), max 8 guests. Inns: max 9 guest bedrooms. Must have resident manager. Min 1,500 sq ft. Guest parking in rear. One kitchen only. Max 15 days per 60-day period per patron.

title: Boarding Houses
summary: Max 4 guest bedrooms (up to original count), max 8 guests. Resident manager required. Must be in originally-constructed dwelling. One kitchen. Parking in rear.

title: Cemeteries
summary: Tombstones/crypts min 20ft from side/rear lot lines, 30ft from street ROW. Off-street parking for funeral processions. Direct access to major/minor thoroughfare.

title: Child Care Centers
summary: Min 2,500 sq ft fenced outdoor play area (6ft fence). Hours 6am-7pm in residential districts. No 24-hour care. Parking: 1/vehicle, 1/employee, 2 per 15 children. State/federal licenses required. Must maintain residential character in residential districts.

title: Drinking Places (Alcoholic Beverages)
summary: No bar/nightclub within 100ft of residential dwelling, church, civic use, or another drinking place (exception: C-B district structures fronting Main Street). No flashing lights. Sound not audible beyond property line.

title: Drive-Throughs
summary: Cannot front on primary public street. Only permitted in N-C and H-B districts. Max 2 lanes on side of building (financial institutions in H-B may have up to 4). Loudspeakers 50ft min from residential structures. Type B landscaping screening required.

title: Duplexes (Two-Family Attached Dwellings)
summary: Not permitted on lots greater than 3 acres. Must be visually compatible with surrounding neighborhood. Corner lot duplexes must have each unit front on a different street.

title: Electronic Gaming Operations
summary: 500ft from churches, schools, daycares, residential zones. 1,000ft from other gaming operations. Max 20 machines. All activity indoors. Operator must be 21+. Parking: 1 space per terminal or 1 per 100 sq ft (whichever greater).

title: Elementary and Secondary Schools
summary: New construction/expansions require major site plan. Public school sites may be reserved in subdivision plans per NCGS 160A-372(c). Town cannot deny public school site plan based on road level of service.

title: Family Campgrounds
summary: Min 5 acres. RV spaces 100ft from lot lines. 10% recreational area. 24ft interior roads. Water/sewer required. Central bathhouse within 300ft. Spaces rented by day only, max 30-day stay.

title: Family Care Homes
summary: Per NC GS Chapters 122C, 131D, 168. Max 6 residents (plus homeowner/family). Licensed by NC DHHS. No closer than 1/2 mile from another care home. No exterior signage. No lockdown/violent residents.

title: Flea Markets
summary: Must comply with Rowan County Health Dept. Vendor records required. Principal building must be enclosed; outdoor spaces on same property allowed 3 days/week. Parking: 1 space per exhibitor plus 2 per display area.

title: Golf Courses and Driving Ranges
summary: No green within 150ft of property line. Lighting shielded from adjacent properties. Driving ranges not lighted for night use. Non-residential buildings 100ft from property line.

title: Heliports
summary: Must meet FAA requirements. Full master plan with flight approach patterns and noise cones required. Designed by registered professional. Structures/facilities 50ft from property lines. Fuel storage 100ft from property lines.

title: Home Occupations
summary: Incidental to residential use. Max 25% of floor area or 500 sq ft (whichever less). 1 non-resident employee max. No outdoor storage. No visible products from street. Hours 8am-9pm. Passenger vehicles only. Sign max 4 sq ft.

title: Manufactured Homes (on individual lots)
summary: Must be multi-sectional (no single-wide). Must bear HUD tag. Towing apparatus/wheels removed. NC Dept of Insurance setup standards. Continuous masonry foundation. Min 32 sq ft front porch. Front parallel to front property line.

title: Manufactured Home Parks (Special Use only)
summary: Min 5 acres, min 5 spaces, max 8 spaces/acre, max 5 units/acre. Min 60ft space width. 30ft separation between units. Paved streets, water/sewer required. 5% recreational area. Full-time on-site manager for 75+ sites.

title: Microbreweries and Craft Distilleries
summary: Must include areas for demonstration, education, retail, or tasting. Max 7,000 sq ft excluding tasting areas. No open storage. No drive-through. Must have off-street/alley loading.

title: Mini-Warehouses
summary: Min 2 acres. Must comply with Chapter 13 building design. Storage fronts on interior drives only (not visible from street). Outdoor storage max 10% of lot. 8ft perimeter fence. Dead storage only (no assembly/fabrication/repair). No junk storage.

title: Mining and Quarrying (Extraction of Earth Products)
summary: Requires detailed site plan by NC Registered Surveyor/Engineer. Extensive application requirements including excavation extent, drainage, environmental studies, reclamation plan, dust/noise control, and operational standards.

title: Mixed Residential Developments
summary: Min 2 acres, 100ft frontage. HOA required with articles approved by Town Attorney. 20% common space. Type A buffer adjoining residential zones. Paved parking/driveways. Screened solid waste storage.

title: Nursing and Residential Care Facilities
summary: Parking: 1/employee (largest shift) + 1 per 3 clients. 20ft min between structures. No building over 40,000 sq ft within 500ft of residential zone. State/county licensing required.

title: Outdoor Storage (non-residential)
summary: All outdoor storage in rear yard only. Must be screened from street view with opaque screen. Referenced by many commercial/industrial uses.

title: Parking of Recreational and Commercial Vehicles
summary: RVs not dwelling units. Max 6 vehicles stored on residential lot. RVs stored in designated parking area, not front yard (except driveway). Commercial vehicles with 2+ axles require 1+ acre lot in residential districts.

title: Pet Care and Veterinary Services (outdoor kennels)
summary: Outdoor kennels 250ft from residential zones, 50ft from other property lines. 6ft opaque fence. Noise buffering required. Clean/sanitary conditions. One sign max 9 sq ft.

title: Produce Stands
summary: Permanent stands only as accessory to agricultural use (produce grown on same-owner lot). Not in ROW. 10ft from side lot lines. Non-illuminated signs max 4 sq ft. Must be maintained when not in operation.

title: Professional Recovery Facilities
summary: Half-mile separation from other recovery facilities, congregate living, or family care homes. Outdoor areas in rear/side yard only, 6ft fence. Activities 8am-10pm. No facility signage beyond mailbox name.

title: Recyclable Material Wholesalers (includes scrap metal, junkyard, scrap processor, auto wrecking yard)
summary: Min 5 acres. Thoroughfare access. 200ft from residential districts. Not in flood/wetland/watershed areas. 30ft setback for materials. 8ft screening fence. NFPA compliance for combustible materials. Type A perimeter buffer.

title: Rural Family Occupations
summary: Limited non-residential in separate/residential structure exceeding home occupation allowances. Min 2 acres, max 1/4 acre or 25% for occupation. Owner must reside on property. Max 2 non-resident employees. Limited to specified professional uses. Hours 8am-9pm. No outside/heavy equipment storage.

title: Solar Electric Generation
summary: Under 6,000 sf: screening required near residential/ROW; rooftop or ground (ground limited to 1/2 of residential structure footprint). Over 6,000 sf: min 10 acres in R-P, 50ft setbacks, 10ft max height, 8ft fence, decommissioning plan with surety required.

title: Waste Management and Remediation Services
summary: Min 5 acres. Security fence. 75ft from ROW, 500ft from residential zones. No filling in floodplains/wetlands/watershed or within 100ft of stream. 300ft setback from residential for landfills. Reclamation plan required.

title: Wireless Telecommunications Towers
summary: Max 150ft height. Setback equal to tower height from all properties. 100ft from R-P/R-S/R-T lots, 40ft from others. Must support 1+ additional user. Tree preservation required in R-S. Non-shiny finish, no lights unless FAA-required.

title: Wireless Communications Facilities, Small (Small Wireless Facilities)
summary: Covers small wireless facilities per NCGS 160D-935. Detailed requirements for collocations on existing structures, new poles in ROW, and installations outside ROW. Height limits, concealment requirements, application procedures.

title: Yard Sales
summary: Permitted in all districts. Specific regulations for frequency, duration, signage, and cleanup requirements.

title: Temporary Uses
summary: Covers temporary structures, seasonal sales, construction trailers, temporary events, and other time-limited uses. Requirements for permits, duration limits, and site restoration.
